sources.name: HSE
sources.dataset: Health and Safety Executive, Working days lost

sources.name: Faculty of Pain Medicine
sources.dataset: National pain audit and workforce survey

metadata.methodology: Chronic pain prevalence from nationally representative survey data and GP record analysis (pain lasting 3+ months). Work impact from HSE Labour Force Survey. Pain clinic waits from referral-to-treatment data, specialist pain services.
knownIssues: Chronic pain prevalence estimates vary widely depending on definition used (28M is the broadest measure)
Pain clinic wait data incomplete — some ICBs do not commission standalone services
Work impact figures likely undercount self-employed and informal economy
